Details: From one study, powdered activated carbon (PAC) alone was 65 percent effective in diuron removal for the conditions evaluated (pH 8, 10 mg/L PAC, 5 min, surface water). The effectiveness of PAC was increased with it was combined with preoxidation using ozone/chlorine. Complete removal of diuron was seen when PAC adsorption was combined with preoxidation with chlorine/ozone and conventional treatment.
